items.text:
CASTING CALL – NON-SPEAKING PRODUCT VIDEO

Roles:
Looking for 6 men and women, ages 25–50, all ethnicities welcome. Product is a type of food storage bag. Non-union. 

Project Details:
This is a simple, non-speaking product shoot focused on natural, everyday usage in a home environment.

Rate:
$30/hour (minimum 4-hour pay = $120)

Location:
Vancouver and/or Langley
Some roles will require 2 shoot days (one in each location).
One role will require 1 shoot day in Langley only. 

Shoot Dates:
TBD – Scheduling is flexible. We are aiming to film within the next 1–2 weeks and will coordinate based on availability.

Submission Instructions:
Please email the following to Ecomfilmworks@gmail.com
- Recent photos
- Any relevant experience (optional)
- General availability over the next 2 weeks

Subject Line: Casting – Food Storage

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - SHORT FILM CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22. 

The deadline for self-tapes have been extended to Friday April 17th at 11:59PM. Callbacks will be held on Monday April 20 (6:00-8:00PM) and Tuesday April 21 (TBD).

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to gomethod. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please email methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com for any inquires.

We are looking for both **union and non-union** actors.

Character Bios:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 35-45, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. 

Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 17 @ 11:59PM. The callbacks will be on April 20th and April 21th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. 

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. We hope to hear from you :)

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Hey,

Looking for my next project / company.

Working as a rehearsal director and choreographer assistant, with experience restaging work and leading rehearsals with companies such as Kibbutz Contemporary Dance Company, Ballet de l’Opéra du Grand Avignon, Leipzig Ballet, Scapino Ballet Rotterdam, and Ostrava Ballet.

Strong focus on maintaining performance quality, running rehearsals, and working closely with dancers, both in creation processes and existing works, supporting choreographers and developing material in the studio.

Also open to teaching, classes, privates, and guiding dancers through creative processes.

Based in LA, open to travel or relocation if needed.

If you’re working on something and need support in the studio, feel free to reach out, happy to share CV / materials 🙏

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - FEATURE FILM 🎬

We are currently casting adult actors for an upcoming feature film and are honoured to have now been given the opportunity to begin casting children for this production on behalf of the filmmakers.

A key role requires portraying one character from birth to 4 years old, and we are now seeking:

Caucasian girls across the following age ranges:
Newborn / up to 6 months
6-18 months
18 months - 3 years
3-4 years

Role Note:

This role represents the same child across multiple ages, so we are especially keen to find children who share similar features and overall appearance.

We strongly encourage submissions from:
Siblings or family members who resemble each other
Children with a similar look (facial structure, colouring, etc.)

Details:

Any hair colour considered
No previous acting experience required

Applications must be submitted by a parent or legal guardian

Filming location and dates TBC

📩 To apply, please send:
Child’s name & date of birth
Recent, clear photographs (no filters, no dummies, no hats, no big bows)
Parent/guardian contact details
Current location

Email: info@majesticacademyofperformingarts.co.uk

Subject: Feature Film Casting - Girl Age & Name 

We are excited to begin this process and would greatly appreciate any shares.

Thank you 🎬

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Casting for various extras roles for a commercial filming in Tottenham.  
SHOOT DATES: Tuesday 12th May possibly also 13th/14th May.  All cast must be residents of Tottenham London. 
ROLES; BUILDERS: MALE - 18-45 - ANY ETHNICITY. GRANDPARENTS: MALE & FEMALE - 55-75 - ANY ETHNICITY. TEENAGERS: ANY GENDER - 16-25 PLAYING AGE - ANY ETHNICITY 
MUSIC ARTIST'S FRIENDS: MALE & FEMALE - 20-30 - ANY ETHNICITY, 
TEENS RIDING BIKES: 16-25 PLAYING AGE - ANY ETHNICITY - MUST BE ABLE TO RIDE BIKES OR SKATE AND DO TRICKS. YOUNG PEOPLE: ANY GENDER - 16-35 - ANY ETHNICITY 
KIDS: ANY GENDER - 16+ but look younger  - ANY ETHNICITY COUPLE: MALE & FEMALE OR FEMALE & FEMALE - 18-30 – ANY ETHNICITY.OTHER 
SNOOKER PLAYERS: MEN AND WOMEN BUT MAINLY MALE - 20-55 - ANY ETHNICITY  

USAGE: Film, Stills and BTS - Social/Online/Digital/In-Store  1 year from live date but content won't be removed from social pages and website. FEE: £160 per person for half a day. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT LIVE IN TOTTENHAM OR HARRINGAY. Please  fill out this form to apply: https://form.jotform.com/261063165996061 or email casscastings@gmail.com. Thank you. PLEASE TAG and SHARE with anyone who lives in Tottenham.

Hey everyone, we’re Limitless Company — a talent agency working across the world in commercial performance✨ 
We’re currently offering a 3-hour audition-style industry workshop for dancers and performers, designed to give you a real insight into what professional auditions and rehearsals are like.
What’s included:
• Mock audition & rehearsal session
• Acting / speaking segment
• Short Q&A at the end
We’re also actively scouting new talent to join our books and progress into professional work 👀
If this sounds like something you or your students would be interested in, drop us a message or contact us at dance.limitlesscompany@gmail.com / @limitless.lmz       

#newtalent #workshops #danceopportunity #qnasession #performer

items.text:
casting call music video (screen age 12-19)
Hello! DIY music video project seeking a figurant for 1-day shoot between April 29 - May 3. 

Non-speaking role, the figurant will simply be riding a bike (or scooter, or skateboard, depending on your preference) through a suburban neighbourhood. Screen age between 12-19.

If interested, please contact [abezyanafilms@gmail.com](mailto:abezyanafilms@gmail.com).

Non-union shoot, but figurant will be fed & we can offer $100 for the day.

Music video is for local band knitting ([https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven](https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven)) 

________________________________________________________

Salut ! Projet de vidéoclip DIY à la recherche d'un(e) figurant(e) pour pour une journée de tournage entre le 29 avril et le 3 mai. Rôle non-parlant : le figurant se déplacera à vélo (ou en trottinette, ou en planche à roulettes, ton choix) dans un quartier résidentiel. Âge écran : 12 à 19 ans.

Si vous êtes intéressé(e), veuillez contacter abezyanafilms@gmail.com.

Tournage non syndiqué, mais le figurant sera nourri et rémunéré 100 $ pour la journée.

Le clip est pour le groupe montréalais knitting ([https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven](https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven))

WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA
DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04

CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam statystów oraz epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 

STATYŚCI

- Panie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 130 zł (dzień zdjęciowy bez charakteryzacji)

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 200 zł (dzień zdjęciowy 130zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)

EPIZODYŚCI

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: K21 (statysta lub epizodysta)

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line is Seeking Acrobats/Gymnasts/Aerialists
NCLH Shows & Experiences is seeking male identifying seeking gymnasts, aerialists, acrobats, and tramp wall performers for the all-new productions aboard NCL's newest ship, the Norwegian LUNA.  

Please visit [https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/](https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/) to apply!

Mainstage productions include ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second mainstage production, HIKO, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary movement. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Paul Bezzant

Original Aerial Direction: AntiGravity Orlando

Rehearsals begin May 16, 2026

Onboard: $1,350/week ($5,850/month) 

All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule. 

GYMNASTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Tramp Wall, Chinese Pole, Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance ability is a plus but not required.

AERIALISTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance training and understanding of body lines and positions are a huge plus. 

Must be 18 years or older to apply.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'NCL AUDITIONS NORWEGIAN CRUISE CRUISELINE LINE Resani SEVUN ASCE C CT អរា CRUISES® GYMNASTS, AERIALISTS, ACROBATS LAS VEGAS APRIL 21, 2026 Audition Auditiondetails details *By Appointment Only NCLH SHOWS &EXPERIENCES CREATIVE CREATIVESTUDIOS- CRE VE TUDIOS'

items.text:
Hey everyone I’m back!

We are still accepting tapes for my upcoming St. Joan period piece shot on 16mm film in Florida! More details in the shared post.

It’s not too late to audition for Joan but just letting potential applicants know, we have locked down on a potential candidate already unless someone better comes along.

We are mainly looking for more applicants for Isabelle Romée and the Nun, to give us more options.

We hope to hear from you soon!

sharedPost.text:
And the pivotal moment is here, the official casting call for St. Joan! Do not hesitate to reach out to our contacts if you want to apply for the listed parts (and don’t forget to share the GoFundMe!) and help bring this period piece to life. This will require a larger team than normal given the nature of the film, a period piece shot on film. 

Just a note that this is a historical and biographical film, so we are prioritizing actors who not only have studied these real historical figures and have done the necessary research to accurately reflect how they lived in life, but also somewhat resemble them in real life.

Share with anybody you think will be interested in applying for a part, or apply yourself if you match one of the positions. Filming is being done in Florida.

Non-union and at the moment, unpaid, until adequate funding is achieved via the GoFundMe. 

Catering and crafty will be provided, along with IMDb credits.

https://gofund.me/389fda838 

#indiefilm #indiefilmmaking #castingcall #castingnotice #biographicalfilm #stjoan #historicalfilm #16mmfilm #krasnogorsk3

sharedPost.text:
Kacper Majewski i sesja w hotelu MARZEC 2026
Artykuł 197, paragraf 1 w praktyce?

O tym panu pisałem stosunkowo niedawno. Konto dość bezczelnie ubrane w kradzione zdjęcia i co najważniejsze, to i bezczelna odpowiedź, a to strasznie mocno motywuje. Brak portfolio, nazwy agencji i to o ile jest i kontakt TYLKO przez PRIV. Profil w ogóle nie pozostawia jak dla mnie wątpliwości, bo chociaż sprawca użył tylko kilku zdjęć z „dawcą wizerunku” to w sieci jest tego cała masa. Wystarczyło skorzystać z takiego narzędzia jak „Obiektyw Google”.

Najzabawniejsze w tym przypadku jest to, że wizerunek tegoż pana został już wykorzystany na innym, równie fejkowym koncie jak Lary Frye, gdzie dodatkowo pozuje on z dzieckiem.

Kacper jako Kacper został przeze mnie zapytany o to, dlaczego wykorzystuje zdjęcia z sieci, ale odpowiedział dość agresywnie, co dodatkowo wzbudziło moją ciekawość, a do tego zostałem przez niego zablokowany. No cóż, prawda? Zdarza się i tak. Moim zdaniem jednak fotograf, który kopiuje czyjś dorobek podpisując się pod tym jest zwykłym kłamcą. O tym panu zdecydowanie można powiedzieć też coś więcej. Dlaczego?

Tak jak informacje o nim zawarłem dość pobieżnie w poprzednim poście, tak niestety przy tych argumentach, które opisuję powyżej, nie dla wszystkich było to jasne. W nieustalonej konwersacji skontaktowało się z nim pewne dziewczę, które chciało podjąć się współpracy. Wiadomo tylko tyle, że na etapie „rozmowy rekrutacyjnej” poszkodowana wysłała mu kilka swoich zdjęć. Nie wiadomo też, czy zrobiła je specjalnie na jego potrzeby, czy też wcześniej miała jakąś sesję? Wiadomo jednak, że ten zaprosił ją do hotelu.

Wg krótkiego posta zamieszczonego na temat Kacperka, spotkanie miało luźny charakter, a sama sesja miałaby być robiona następnego dnia. W domyśle, zatem na początku nie było mowy o zdjęciach.

Drogie Panie! Kacper Majewski wg tych informacji tłumaczy się, że ma własna firmę związaną z produkcją zdjęć. Dlaczego wykorzystuje cudze i to ogólnodostępne zdjęcia? Dlaczego nie wysyła, czy też nie zamieszcza swojego portfolio w gestii uwiarygodnienia? Dlaczego zaprasza na sesję do hotelu i dlaczego TA ma mieć miejsce następnego dnia? Co się dzieje tego pierwszego dnia?

Nie wiadomo, do czego doszło w w/w historii, której zrzut zamieszczam. Wiadomo jednak, że autorka posta dała się oszukać, ale zgłosiła sprawę na policję. Postarałem się nawiązać z nią kontakt, ale czy mi odpowie?

Link do konta Kacper Majewski https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61585782975505

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '21:52 ··· 67 Posty PRACA w BRANŻY EVENTO... Dołącz 4 dni UWAGA! Proszę uważać na użytkownika „Kacper majewski" Uważa że ma firme fotograficzna itd, zaprosił mnie na spotkanie ,zgodziłam się... Wynajął hotel mówiąc że dopiero jutro zajmiemy się fotografowaniem Szybko tego pożałowałam że się zgodziłam... Zaistniała sytuacja została zgłoszona na policję Potem zaczął mnie szantażować że mnie zniszczy jeżeli nie odwołam oskarżeń oraz udostępni wszędzie moje intymne zdjęcia które mu wysłałam do „portfolio" Także proszę uważać...'

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet ( Gliwice/Katowice )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów składającą się z osób z różnym doświadczeniem filmowym i miejscem zamieszkania. Spotykamy się 1 2 razy w miesiącu na sesjach testowych i video w wybrane niedziele, ustalane 1 2 tygodnie wcześniej. Projekt realizujemy na terenie Gliwic.

** **

**Kolejne nasze spotkanie to 26.04.26 i 03.05.26 ( Niedziela )   godz. 10:30 - 15:00**

 

Nasza Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje chętną osobę do projektu niekomercyjnego mini serialu osadzonego głównie w 1940 roku. Najlepiej jakby takie osoby były  ** z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrza czy Katowice najdalej.**

 

1 – Rycerz Zakonu Templariuszy wiek: 40 – 50 z zarostem, kwestie po francusku

2 – Ojciec głównej bohaterki ‘’Antoni’’ ( Polak ) wiek: 35 – 40, kilka odcinków kwestie po Polsku

3 – Podoficer niemiecki Waffen SS ( Niemiec ) wiek: 25 – 40, bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku

4 – Zastępczyni szefa Ahnenerbe ( Niemka ) wiek: 25 – 30, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Niemiecku

5 – Oficer francuski wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, 1 scena kwestie po francusku

6 – Wujek głównej bohaterki ‘’Leon’’( Polak ) wiek: 40 – 45, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Polsku

7 – Niemiecki żołnierz wiek: 20 – 40 bez zarostu, 2 odcinki kwestie po niemiecku

8 – Niemiecki żandarm wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku, 2 odcinki

9 -  Niemiecka pani Archeolog: 35 – 40 o blond włosach, kwestie po niemiecku.

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Ostatni tydzień castingu - 20-24 kwietnia! 

PILNE - poszukujemy dublera/dublerki - [Teatr Ewolucji Cienia](https://www.facebook.com/groups/2025613644338077/user/100063863580637/?__cft__[0]=AZb18s-gqPJKVeLlTn1-s4WqV3nQVDQDNY-qpwxcEIEoiFAbYIHwOR-So0mA0eKj8G4Hg4eNL_9cYi6Q_miGtybkD0BivTUOr-nBguTfsdzHEcKCDW8MPvdhd_fO3hGG2HbgtrWxiIu2k09Qv_rmyEagPVy9ZAVvmAIpUDy4erF09Q&__tn__=-]K-R)  

Szukamy aktorów około 20-35 lat, z dobrą kondycją fizyczną i poczuciem rytmu. Dziewczyna 170-173 cm wzrostu, koniecznie długie włosy; chłopak 180 - 185cm wzrostu. 

TYLKO dla osób z Ponania. Tu mamy próby, stąd wyjeżdżamy ze spektaklami  i wracamy z trasy (powroty zazwyczaj w nocy). 

Jesteśmy teatrem plenerowym, więc oferujemy angaż na sezon letni – gramy zazwyczaj w weekendy. 

Pracujemy w nurcie teatru fizycznego, wizualnego, stąd ważna jest umiejętność wyrażania emocji i ekspresja ruchowa.  

Prześlij swoje zdjęcie i kilka słów o sobie na adres: biuro@fundacjawtn.org

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text: Die Musikerin und Sängerin Eva Piazza singt zusammen mit ihrem Bruder Yoann Piazza wieder im Lindenhof Theater Braunschweig. Auf dem Programm stehen französische Chansons nicht nur von Edith Piaf. Das Konzert findet am 18. Mai um 19.30 Uhr im Lindenhof Theater in Braunschweig statt. Die Karten gibt es hier https://lindenhof-braunschweig.de/veranstaltung/eva-piazza-singt-franzoesische-chansons-nicht-nur-von-edith-piaf-2-teil und bei der Konzertkasse und bei Musikalien Bartels und an der Abendkasse.

items.text:
Looking for 3–5 female models for a shoot in Malibu this Tuesday.

This is for a well-known retail brand and will be a great opportunity to get strong, high-quality content. While this is an unpaid shoot, all models will receive edited photos for their portfolios. We’ll have food and crafty on set, and it should be a fun, well-run day. There’s also potential for this to turn into ongoing shoots moving forward. If interested, please DM with photos, height, and availability.

items.text:
Hey everyone — I’m officially open atm and available for acting work!

I bring over 10 years of experience in the industry as a professional actor, model, and content creator. I’ve worked across a wide range of projects, both union and non-union, and I’m comfortable in front of the camera in everything from film and TV to commercial and digital content.

I take pride in delivering strong, authentic performances and maintaining a professional, reliable presence on set. Whether it’s a lead role, supporting part, or creative collaboration, I’m always ready to bring energy and commitment to the project.

If you’re casting, producing, or know someone who is — feel free to reach out or connect. Let’s create something great.

🎥 Open to:
• Film & TV
• Commercials
• Modeling
• Social/Digital Content
• Creative Collaborations

📩 DM for inquiries

#Actor #CastingCall #OpenToWork #FilmIndustry #Model #ContentCreator #NowCasting

items.text:
# Casting People 65+ with a Distinct Look

We are seeking individuals age 65 and over for an upcoming fine art photography project by an emerging artist.
This series explores individuality, personal style, and the dreams people carry with them throughout life. We are especially drawn to people with a strong visual identity — those who have shaped themselves in an interesting way, whether through style, performance, transformation, or unconventional life paths.
If you feel like you don’t look like everyone else, we’d love to hear from you. We're especially interested in people with unusual and distinct faces and style.
No acting or modeling experience is required — we simply want you to be yourself.
The project will take place in Santa Monica, LA on Monday 20th. Participants will be paid $100 for a half-day session, with overtime compensated at $20 per hour. Lunch will be provided, along with gas money.
If you’re interested, please dm me with:
-Your name and age
-A recent photo (a phone photo is perfectly fine)
-A short note about yourself
We’re also happy to answer any questions.

items.text:
Came across this and thought it was worth sharing since a lot of people ask about legit acting training 👀

It’s a **trial acting class from Green Room Acting Studio**, and there’s been a lot of really strong feedback around it. Everyone who’s taken it seems to have a great experience, which is honestly rare to see consistently.

It’s $55 and you can pick your own class time and coach, so there’s flexibility and no pressure to commit long term right away.

What stands out is that the coaches are actual industry professionals. People working out of LA, New York, Atlanta, Miami, not just teaching but actively involved in the industry. Names like David Wenzel, Barry Shapiro, Ricki Maslar, and Ani Avetyan.

Also, the fact that it’s online makes it even better. No need to relocate or move cities just to access that level of training. It’s all accessible from wherever you are.

It’s also known as one of the largest online platforms for acting training right now, so the trial class seems like a solid way to explore it.

If anyone’s been looking into acting classes, this might be worth checking out.

items.text:
🎶 Offering Free Voice Lessons in West Hollywood! 🎶

Hi! I’m Colleen, owner of Virtuoso Studios. I’ve personally built a team of exceptional music teachers, and I’m excited to introduce the newest member of our team while offering free trial lessons for new students!

Kelly Vargas is a Los Angeles-based singer, songwriter, and music teacher with a blend of pop, R&B, and Latin influences. As a bilingual artist (English/Spanish), she brings a modern, expressive style into both her music and teaching.

Her music has been featured on platforms like Netflix and Peacock, and she teaches voice, piano, and guitar to students of all ages and levels!

Kelly’s teaching style is supportive, engaging, and creative. She focuses on building strong technique, confidence, and helping each student find their unique voice. Lessons are available in Los Angeles or virtual.

Try a free lesson with Kelly today! Fill out the form here: [www.virtuosostudios.org/free-trial-lessons](http://www.virtuosostudios.org/free-trial-lessons)

sharedPost.text:
Kamed Studio 

21 kwietnia 
Stawki płatne po planie:
dorośli 120 zł.
dzieci 150 zł.

Gramy w Milanówku 🙂 scenę chrzcin 

Na plan nowego serialu szukamy kilku statystów w różnym wieku, którzy wcielą się w członków rodziny bohaterów serialu. Szukamy osób z Milanówka, bliskich okolic lub takich, którzy nie mają problemu z samodzielnym dojazdem na plan. (Dobrze działająca kolejka WKD)
Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie zgłoszenia na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać 
- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- informację skąd jesteś 
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- aktualne zdjęcie (twarz I sylwetka)
- dzieci informację czy posiadają w naszej agencji ważne dokumenty PiP

Tytuł maila CHRZCINY

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – EPIZOD AKTORSKI – CHŁOPIEC 9-11 LAT**

 

Do filmu fabularnego szukam chłopca 7-11 lat. Naturalnego, ujmującego, z charakterem: „słodki łobuziak”, energiczny, trochę „do przodu”, z ulicznym vibe’em (hip-hop, rytm). Nie szukam „reklamowego” typu. To bardzo poruszająca rola. Mile widziani chłopcy z doświadczeniem w filmach/serialach fabularnych. Krótkie włosy będą atutem, ale nie są warunkiem.

Rola przewiduje ok. 3 dni zdjęciowe, w interakcji z głównymi bohaterami.

Casting będzie dwuetapowy:

1.    selekcja na podstawie nadesłanych materiałów,

2.    zaproszenie wybranych chłopców na casting do studia w Warszawie.

Casting i zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie – preferowani chłopcy z Warszawy i okolic.

**Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do poniedziałku 20.04 do godz.: 10:00**

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost + informacja o doświadczeniu przed kamerą**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

sharedPost.text: … in einer lauen Sommernacht? Täglich, zum Frühstück, höre ich die Hiobsbotschaften. Kriege, Naturkatastrophen, Tote, verletzte und das von morgens bis abends. Und dann kommen bei dir vielleicht noch die Dinge dazu, die einfach aus dem Ruder laufen . Dazu ! Ich frag mich manchmal wie wir das aushalten? Was es letztendlich mit uns macht?

items.text:
Hejka,
Jesteśmy studentami kierunku reżyserii na uczelni Społeczna Akademia Nauk.
Szukamy aktora do głównej roli w realizacji dyplomowej pracy reżyserskiej.

Mężczyzna w wieku 18–24 lata. Ważne: charyzma, naturalna obecność przed kamerą oraz podstawowe umiejętności taneczne.

Projekt niekomercyjny, współpraca na zasadzie barteru.

Jeśli czujesz, że to coś dla Ciebie — napisz w wiadomości prywatnej.

Dzien dobry,

Chcialam zgloscic swoje mieszkanie jako lokację.

Mieszkanie 56 metrów: salon z kuchnią, sypialnia, garderoba, lazienka. Mieszkanie po remoncie. 5 pietro z windą. nasłonecznione. Rondo Wiatraczna, Warszawa.

załączam zdjecia.

pozdrawiam, 

Anna

items.text:
CASTING CALL: New Project Shooting this August!

Project Title: Shades of Identity

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

The Details
Shoot Date: August 2026

How to Apply: Choose a monologue for the role you’re interested in, record your self-tape, and email it directly to me!

Character Breakdown
We are looking for the following roles:

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

items.text:
Playbox Productions – Seeking Collaborators for Upcoming Production!
> 🚨 **URGENT CALL** 🚨

**PLAYBOX PRODUCTIONS** is seeking production team members for an upcoming play in 2026 (to be announced).

This will be an **intimate, small-cast production**, focused on grounded, truthful work and a strong ensemble process.

> **TO APPLY:**
1. Send your Resume, and Website (if applicable) to:
**playboxpgh@gmail.com**
2. Include your availability for the production timeline, especially tech and performances.
3. And ask us any questions you may have!

> **Timeline:**
* Rehearsals: August 3 – September 13 (Strip District)
* Tech + Performances: September 14 – October 4 (Downtown Pittsburgh)

> All roles are **volunteer/contract-based**, with the intention of paying cast and crew per production. Compensation is **contingent on overall budget and ticket sales**.
> For reference, we were able to compensate our team during our sold-out run of *1984* in December 2025.
> Members of the Playbox community have worked with City Theatre, The Public Theater, The Pittsburgh Cultural Trust, Carnegie Mellon, Point Park, CLO, The Talent Group, and the 48 Hour Play Festival, to name a few. Please see roles below.

## **Currently Seeking:**

> **Production Manager**

Oversees the logistical and operational execution of the production from pre-production through closing.
* Coordinates schedules and timelines
* Manages logistics and communication
* Supports rehearsals and performances
* Acts as liaison between artistic and technical teams
> **Director**
* Develops and executes the artistic vision
* Leads rehearsals and guides performers
* Collaborates with designers and production staff
> **Stage Manager**
* Runs rehearsals and performances
* Tracks blocking, cues, and notes
* Maintains reports and team communication
> **Assistant Stage Managers (ASM)**
* Assist with rehearsal setup and breakdown
* Help track props, cues, and backstage needs
* Support communication and organization during rehearsals, tech, and shows
> **Designers (Set, Props Asst., Sound, & Lighting Designers)**

Collaborate with the director and team to shape the visual and technical elements of the production.

* Design and execute assigned elements
* Work closely with director and technical team
* Participate in meetings and tech rehearsals

## **Additional Roles We Are Seeking:**

> **Producers**

Support overall coordination, planning, and execution of the production alongside the Playbox team.
> **Construction / Set Builders**

Assist in building and assembling scenic elements to bring the set design to life.
> **Fight Director**

Design and safely choreograph staged physical moments and ensure actor safety.
> **Board Operators**

Run lighting or sound cues during performances.
> **Marketing Manager**

Leads the programming & promotion the production through social media, content, and audience outreach.

Thank You!

We look forward to your application and will be in touch shortly if interested via email or phone call.

**The Playbox Team, 2026**
Office #: (412) 282-3916
*[Website Currently Under Construction]*

sharedPost.text:
📣📣CASTING📣📣

Zapraszamy na dwuetapowy casting, z pierwszym etapem online! Szukamy aktorki w wieku 18+ do zagrania w spektaklu - bajce kurdyjskiej na podstawie książki "Opowieści Dengbeżów. Baśnie i bajki kurdyjskie". Mile widziane są umiejętności animacji, gdyż w spektaklu wykorzystamy animację lalką.

Premiera spektaklu jest planowana na początek czerwca, próby do spektaklu w maju w weekendy oraz w trakcie majówki w Zamościu (woj. lubelskie) oraz Kielcach (woj. świętokrzyskie), stąd wymagamy dostępności w tym okresie.

Eksploatację spektaklu planujemy w lato 2026 w trakcie festiwali (m.in. Pol'and'Rock Festiwal w Strefie Warsztatów ASP) dlatego dostępność w czerwcu, lipcu i sierpniu również jest dla nas ważna.

📣📣 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila: fundacjabanina@gmail.com 📣📣

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: 
✅ twoje CV
✅ wizytówkę, w formie linku do YouTube

❗Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 23 kwietnia❗

Casting może się przedłużyć, w przypadku gdy w wyznaczonym czasie nie znajdziemy odpowiedniej osoby.

O zakończeniu castingu poinformujemy na naszych social mediach tj. Facebook i Instagram

Something powerful is rising… 🌑

We’re proud to officially announce Lobo Oscuro  — a project built on raw vision, fearless storytelling, and a commitment to creating something that leaves a mark.

This isn’t just another production. It’s a movement of creativity, grit, and collaboration. And we’re just getting started.

With that said… opportunities are opening.

Casting calls will be announced soon, and we’re looking for dedicated, passionate individuals ready to bring intensity, authenticity, and depth to the screen. Whether you’re experienced or emerging, if you have the drive — we want to see you.

Stay ready. Stay sharp. Your moment could be closer than you think.

More details coming soon. 🎬

items.title: Hey everyone

sharedPost.text:
Hero is a smart guy working in the city hero is a skeptic documentary film maker. But he doesn't like his mother—she sold herself to feed me raised and sustained her son through prostitution. Once the son grew up and disliked it, he moved away from his mother and is living a simple life in the city. A channel is interviewing him. He's speaking with Sadananda, who has enormous wealth worth crores but has abandoned everything, living an ordinary life without even wearing shoes. Hero is interviewing him.
THE DIALOGUE:
HERO: Do you say ghosts and spirits exist?
SADANANDA: They do.
HERO: Then show me.
SADANANDA: (Silent)
HERO: (Laughs) Even in this generation, aren't ghosts and spirits just superstitions?
SADANANDA: Is there air around us?
HERO: Yes.
SADANANDA: Show it.
HERO: How does that work? How can we show air?
SADANANDA: We know air exists around us, but we can't show it. Ghosts also exist. Soon you will go to the ghost. Death is searching for you. It's waiting for your arrival.
(Hero just stares)
SADANANDA: God exists—that's true. Ghosts also exist. You don't believe in either.
HERO: I believe in death.
SADANANDA: Then be prepared for death. It's not yours—it's your mother's.
HERO: (Shocked)

STUDENT DISSERTATION FILM - CAST AND CREW CALL‼️
Hello everyone! 

Soon, I will be making a psychological/thriller film for my dissertation and wanted to ask if you all would be interested in joining my crew/cast. 

The film is called BIRDSONG. About a man, The collector, living in a world where dreams are prohibited, he he risks everything just to get the chance to hear his dream one more time.  

I’m looking for two male leads, aged 20+. And for the crew I'm looking for a, cinematographer, production designer, lighting director, sound director/gaffer and a makeup artist. Looking to film in the end of April or the beginning of May.

If you’re interested please let me know asap. You can dm me on WhatsApp +44 7947 570753 or email me on the one provided on the poster. 

Thanks so much!!

items.text:
Hier eine traurige Nachricht. 
Please remember Nathalie Baye. ✨

sharedPost.text:
Die französische Film-Ikone Nathalie Baye ist im Alter von 77 Jahren in Paris gestorben und hinterlässt ein filmisches Erbe aus über fünf Jahrzehnten. Wie ihre Familie mitteilte, erlag die vielfach ausgezeichnete Darstellerin am Freitagabend in ihrer Wohnung den Folgen von Lewy-Körperchen-Demenz, einer neurodegenerativen Erkrankung.

Prägende Kraft des europäischen Autorenkinos
Nathalie Baye gehörte zu den zentralen Figuren der europäischen Filmlandschaft und wirkte im Laufe ihrer Karriere in mehr als 80 Produktionen mit. Sie galt als Muse und bevorzugte Charakterdarstellerin der wichtigsten Regisseure des französischen Kinos. Ihre Laufbahn gewann in den 1970er-Jahren an Fahrt, als sie mit François Truffaut in Meisterwerken wie „Die amerikanische Nacht“ (1973) und „Das grüne Zimmer“ (1978) zusammenarbeitete. Später brillierte sie unter der Regie von Jean-Luc Godard in „Rette sich, wer kann (das Leben)“ (1980) sowie in Filmen von Claude Chabrol wie „Die Blume des Bösen“ (2003).

Für ihre eindringlichen, unprätentiösen Darstellungen von Frauen zwischen Stärke und Verletzlichkeit wurde sie mit Preisen überhäuft. Baye gewann insgesamt vier César-Awards – zweimal als beste Hauptdarstellerin und zweimal als beste Nebendarstellerin. Für das sensible Drama „Eine pornografische Beziehung“ erhielt sie 1999 zudem den Darstellerpreis bei den Filmfestspielen von Venedig.

Internationale Bekanntheit durch Hollywood
Obwohl Baye tief im französischen Filmschaffen verwurzelt war, feierte sie auch bemerkenswerte internationale Erfolge. Einem weltweiten Millionenpublikum blieb sie insbesondere durch Steven Spielbergs Hollywood-Hit „Catch Me If You Can“ (2002) im Gedächtnis. Darin verkörperte sie Paula Abagnale, die französische Mutter des von Leonardo DiCaprio gespielten jugendlichen Hochstaplers. Noch in ihren späten Karrierejahren bereicherte sie große internationale Erfolgsproduktionen; so spielte sie 2022 in dem britischen Historienfilm „Downton Abbey II: Eine neue Ära“ eine französische Aristokratin.

Privatleben und kulturelles Vermächtnis
Abseits der Kamera stand Baye besonders in den 1980er-Jahren im Fokus der Öffentlichkeit, als sie mit der französischen Rock-Legende Johnny Hallyday liiert war. Aus der Beziehung ging die 1983 geborene Tochter Laura Smet hervor, die heute in die Fußstapfen ihrer Eltern getreten und selbst eine erfolgreiche Schauspielerin ist.

Mit Nathalie Baye verliert Frankreich eine Darstellerin, die sich nie hinter großen Gesten versteckte, sondern durch ihre subtile Leichtigkeit und Authentizität bestach. Die französische Kulturministerin Catherine Pégard drückte ihre tiefe Trauer über den Verlust dieser „immensen Actrice“ aus.

KAMED STUDIO – POSZUKIWANY POLICJANT 🎬

​Na plan nowego serialu poszukujemy statysty, który wcieli się w rolę młodego policjanta. 
Scenę gramy w malowniczym Milanówku!

​📅 TERMIN: 21 kwietnia
📍 MIEJSCE: Milanówek - dojazd we własnym zakresie (dobry dojazd WKD!)
💰 STAWKA: 120 zł (płatne po planie)

​Kogo szukamy?
​Młodego mężczyzny o aparycji policjanta (atutem będzie krótka, schludna fryzura).
​
​Jak się zgłosić?
​Wyślij SMS pod numer: 731 738 797
​W treści wpisz:
​Imię i nazwisko
​Wiek
​Miejscowość zamieszkania
​
​📸 Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

[CASTING CALL] New Musical Comedy - The Cockpit (Aug 10-11)

Seeking three performers for the premiere of "Murder on the Allotment" at The Cockpit (Camden Fringe 2026).

We are specifically seeking performers with strong Musical Theatre experience and excellent vocal ability. 

**The Roles:**
* **VIRGINIA:** (White/English, female-identifying, 60+) The crusty Daily Mail reader. Sharp-tongued, allotment-obsessed, and carries that perfect "disapproving" energy.
* **HUGH:** (White/English, male-identifying, 60+) The pompous leader of the allotment. Charming but full of himself; the self-appointed "King of the Marrows."
* **KARWAN:** (Global Majority, male-identifying, playing age 17, must be 18+) The anxious but brilliant newcomer.

**FEE:** This is a paid engagement. Full breakdown of rates and rehearsal schedule can be found in the brief below.

**All info and how to audition here: **https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pRTjeHEWhzMs0JN9KHS9UTm4_tkVR6IRMmYrcXUfrGU/edit?usp=sharing

**Instagram:** @murder_allotment_musical for updates.

Seeking three performers for the premiere of "Murder on the Allotment" at The Cockpit (Camden Fringe 2026).

We are specifically seeking performers with strong Musical Theatre experience and excellent vocal ability. 

**The Roles:**
* **VIRGINIA:** (White/English, female-identifying, 60+) The crusty Daily Mail reader. Sharp-tongued, allotment-obsessed, and carries that perfect "disapproving" energy.
* **HUGH:** (White/English, male-identifying, 60+) The pompous leader of the allotment. Charming but full of himself; the self-appointed "King of the Marrows."
* **KARWAN:** (Global Majority, male-identifying, playing age 17, must be 18+) The anxious but brilliant newcomer.

**FEE:** This is a paid engagement. Full breakdown of rates and rehearsal schedule can be found in the brief below.

items.text:
Hi industry folks,

Room for new students has become available at my studio.  I'd love to offer those spots to serious actors who dream big!  

I'm originally ￼from NY and have been teaching in LA for two decades, successfully and safely, tucked away in a convenient, private studio with unlimited parking. Now internationally online as well.  ￼

I help produce working actors at a very high level, launching the careers of many series regulars, and bona fide movie stars, some achieving A-list status. 

Check out the website for testimony and success stories at
www.laurenpatricenadlerstudios.com

Reach out directly at 
Laurenpatricenadler@gmail.com

And follow on Instagram at @LaurenPatriceNadlerStudio
Where the stars are always rising!

I love working with people who dream big 🙂 LPN Studios, where the stars are always rising.

items.text:
Casting Call – Dancers for Nevermind (LA)
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for dancers to be part of my upcoming short film, Nevermind. These performers will embody fragments of the protagonist’s inner world, her thoughts, emotions, and shifting states of mind. The movement language will be expressive, intimate, and rooted in storytelling.

Requirements:

– Contemporary / Modern / Ballet training

– Minimum 1 year of experience

– Strong emotional expression and body awareness

Shoot dates: May 1–3 (LA)

If this resonates with you, please send:

– A short intro

– Dance reel or any movement footage

– Availability for the shoot dates

to rheadamani@gmail.com and cc to himanginipuri@gmail.com

Would love to work with people who are open, sensitive, and curious about translating emotion into movement.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LOS ANGELES ⚽️
Looking for a male soccer player (age 18–30) with a slightly Lionel Messi/ rugged look and some basic acting ability.

📍 Location: Los Angeles  

📅 Date: May 2nd (coming up fast)  

⏰ Duration: Full day   

💵 Pay: $300  

This is for a vertical project — must be comfortable on camera and able to play soccer naturally.

🚨 URGENT CASTING — need to lock this in ASAP.

If interested, DM me right away with:

- Name  

- Age  

- Recent photos  

- acting and soccer Reels are MUST 

Serious inquiries only. Let’s make something great.

items.title: **ACTORS!**

items.text:
Hi, my name is Megan Jenkins, and my partner is called Oscar Smith we are both looking for a young actor ages 16-17(a boy) who are local to Manchester to play a role in our student film.

We will be filming from the 28th-20th may 

We will be paying for food and transport.

Logline- When a quiet high‑school girl is found dead, her former friend haunted by their broken relationship joins the lead investigator to uncover the truth, only to reveal the terrifying murder that had happened.

The role

Liam: Liam is tall and brunette, Liam speaks with confidence and has a very big ego, when speaking to Emily he is excited and can let the confident facade fall he’s happy and giggly.

If you would like to audition or want more details, please email [meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com](mailto:meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com) and I will send you a section of the script.

Kind regards, Megan and Oscar

items.text:
Seeking two actors F (45-60) and M (35-40) - amateur, non professional, semi pro etc. fine - in Stroud area for Rehearsed Reads for a Fringe production running this summer in L&SW. Half day (3.5 hour) sessions to run wc 27 April-8 April (likely x2), £30 per session. Fun acting practice and workshopping with the writer (me). 💫

We've cast the play, but will be opportunity for future performances if you're a good fit.  🤩

Any interest please DM me or email perilofyouthplay@gmail.com

items.text:
❗CASTING❗25.04 - ŁÓDŹ - NON-PROFIT
Szukamy aktorów do krótkometrażowego filmu realizowanego na ASP.
Do roli przyjaciół ADAMA I JARKA.
Preferowane osoby znajome lub przyjaciele - dla naturalnej chemii między postaciami 🙂
ADAM (18-23) - rola główna (wszystkie sceny)
Student ASP, artystyczna dusza. Introwertyczny, obserwujący, trochę zamknięty w sobie.
W historii Adam zaczyna zauważać na swoich zdjęciach obecność widma - coś nieuchwytnego, co z czasem staje się coraz bardziej realne, aż w końcu pojawia się fizycznie w jego przestrzeni.
Adam występuje we wszystkich scenach filmu.
JAREK (18-23) - rola drugoplanowa (1 scena)
Luzak z ASP. Żyje bez spiny. Ma artystyczną wrażliwość, ale brak parcia na wyniki. Bardziej obserwuje życie niż je planuje.
Najlepszy przyjaciel Adama.
Jarek pojawia się w jednej scenie.
Informacje o zdjęciach:
📍 25.04, Łódź
🕘 start ok. 9:00
⏱️ plan: 8–9h
🎬 4 sceny (3 na ASP + 1 w mieszkaniu niedaleko ASP)
Zgłoszenia pod postem bądź też 
📩 Zgłoszenia: castingekipafilmowa@gmail.com
W mailu prosimy o:
- krótkie info o doświadczeniu (film / teatr / brak też ok)
- czy studiujesz aktorstwo lub kierunki artystyczne
- aktualne zdjęcia
- self-tape
Odezwiemy się po przejrzeniu materiałów 🙂
Prowadzimy casting do wtorku

WARSZAWA 

Hejka,
Jesteśmy studentami kierunku reżyserii na uczelni Społeczna Akademia Nauk.
Szukamy aktora do głównej roli w realizacji dyplomowej pracy reżyserskiej. 

Mężczyzna w wieku 18–24 lata. Ważne: charyzma, naturalna obecność przed kamerą oraz podstawowe umiejętności taneczne.

Projekt niekomercyjny, współpraca na zasadzie barteru.

Jeśli czujesz, że to coś dla Ciebie — napisz w wiadomości prywatnej.

🎬 CASTING CALL — HARD KNOTS 🎬

We're building something real out here in ATL.

Hard Knots is an original one-hour street drama set on Atlanta's Westside. Season 1 is in production and we are NOW looking for talent.

📍 Set in Atlanta, GA
🎭 All roles. All backgrounds.
🔞 Rated R — this one ain't for everybody
💰 Unpaid / Deferred Compensation

If you got the look, the hunger, and the range — we want to hear from you.

📩 Send us a DM with your name, age range, headshot, and reel.

Let's make history. ATL, this is for us. 🖤

#HardKnots #CastingCall #ATL #Atlanta #IndieFilm #StreetDrama #ActorsOfATL #AtlantaFilm #BlackFilm #NewSeries #CastingATL

items.text:
AUDITIONS!!!

MURDER FOR TWO by Kellen Blair and Joe Kinosian 

Directed by Kerri Norris for The Royal Canadian Theatre Company

Casting paid, non-union role, 25-40 years old, female presenting, to play THE SUSPECTS. All ethnicities and backgrounds are encouraged to audition. (Please note: the role of Marcus has been cast) 

This role requires a high skill level of piano playing, singing ability and performance. Comedic skills, some dance and ability to improv are assets.This fast paced, 90-minute, musical whodunnit features two actors who act, sing and play the piano throughout. They accompany themselves, each other and sometimes play together. The actor cast as THE SUSPECTS needs a high energy and versatile performance that can switch between the 10 different characters at the drop of a hat. 

Vocal range: Bb3-E5 (as written, but can be transposed)

Grade 9 RCM piano ability for the most difficult passages of music

Rehearsals running August 2nd – September 22nd at The Studio, 10660 City Parkway, Surrey.

(Rehearsals will be Sunday daytime & Tues/Thurs evenings up until show opening. Two additional back-up rehearsals will be scheduled based on cast availability.  Tech week schedule TBD.)

Show runs September/October in Surrey/New Westminster

Surrey: September 25-27 (Dress Rehearsal, Sept 24)
New Westminster: October 2-4 (Dress Rehearsal, Oct 1)
Auditions by electronic submission.  

2 min video recording accompanying yourself singing a comedic song
1 min comedic monologue sample.    
Please also send your headshot and CV with your submission to auditions@rctheatreco.com by May 4th. 

TITLE ALL FILES WITH YOUR NAME!

Local submissions only for this casting call

Callbacks: Saturday, May 9th. (Only those invited to callbacks will be contacted. Those invited will be given a short excerpt from the show to learn, for piano & voice as well as sides from the script.)

sharedPost.text:
Regarde-toi vraiment, comme si tu découvrais un être pour la première fois, au-delà du simple reflet : tu y verras une présence vivante, façonnée par ses joies et ses blessures, habitée par des silences, des élans, des contradictions, un être en chemin, imparfait mais profondément riche, porteur d’histoires, de forces discrètes et de vérités encore inexplorées… alors,  regarde-toi et dis-moi, quel être vois-tu ? 
C’est précisément là que commence notre travail.

#benin #lameditation #sagesse #benindanse

sharedPost.text: Mittsommer Konzert im Lindenhof Theater in Braunschweig. Am 15. Juni spielt Violin Virtuose und Konzertmeister Johannes Denhoff zusammen mit der von ihm gegründeten und geleiteten Lindenhofkapelle das diesjährige Mittsommer Konzert um 19.30 Uhr. Auf dem Programm steht unter anderem die Pastorale von Ludwig van Beethoven. Karten gibt es bei der Konzertkasse und bei Musikalien Bartels und an der Abendkasse oder im Internet unter https://www.eventim.de/event/mittsommer-konzert-theater-im-lindenhof-21176192/?srsltid=AfmBOoq5EEZ9rUIRGNAV_Q9tNLUTU7GeF93HkbE-xNgUF849FgJFA1z-

Schon mal eine Rolle angenommen…

und dich danach gefragt, ob du mehr hättest verlangen sollen? 

Du bist nicht allein!

Viele verlieren Geld, weil sie

❌ unsicher sind

❌ keine Strategie haben

❌ oder Angst haben, den Job zu verlieren

Deshalb haben wir ein gratis PDF erstellt,das dir zeigt, wie du deine Gage selbstbewusst verhandelst 💰❗️ 

Schreib deine Stadt + deinen Namen in die Kommentareund wir senden dir den Link 📩

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

items.text:
⚡️Affordable Showreel Editing Service⚡️
Happy Sunday all! 

Need your first showreel creating or to update your old one? 

I provide a very affordable showreel service for new or established actors/directors/cinematographers/comedians/hobbyists etc. 

Basically, send me your footage (or I can try and source it for you online if it's commercially aired) and I shall edit it together into a lovely reel. 

Please see samples of recent clients in the link below 😎 

I'm an actor myself so I know how frustrating it can be, especially when you're starting out, to collate your footage together to get more work, without wanting to spend a fortune. 

My rates are £25/hour, with duration of work depending on how much footage you have. The average reels have been around £100 for my clients. Much more affordable than the companies that charge £250+ !! 

For any further info / enquiries / to book my services, drop me an email and I'll respond as quickly as I can: 

reelsforanyone@gmail.com 

I'll look forward to hearing from you. 

Thanks! 

😎
items.previewDescription: An affordable showreel editing service for creatives, by creatives.

🎬 EARLY BIRD 🎬 Texas Premiere! 

This captivating short film was shot on location in the breathtakingly beautiful island of 
🇹🇹 Trinidad & Tobago 🇹🇹 

Notably, 🎭🎥: the entire cast and production crew hail from the island of Trinidad and Tobago.

items.text:
Hi there everyone 

I'm casting 20 people for each you tube video below if you suit either please let me know which country you are representing in comments section 

Friday 24th April 

Guess the country 

Brief: You will need to enter the room and bring an object, food or clothing that represents your country you were born in , then KSI and friends will then try and guess which country you were born in and represent 

Anyone born in countries except UK can apply 

Location pinewood film studios , Slough 

11am till 3pm fee £160

Guess the language video 

Do you speak a language except British fluently ? You will be asked to speak in your language for the well known you tubers to then guess the language 

Friday 24th 5pm till 8pm fee £160 

Pinewood film studios 

Thankyou !!

items.text:
Casting Call - Extras (audience)
Hi everyone,

My name is Alfie Hallam and I am directing a 15 minute short film about contemporary dance called Dependence 

For our final day of the shooting, we are shooting a dance show in camberley theatre. If anyone is interested in being an audience member please reply to this post or DM for more details. 

The date of the shoot is the 20th of April. Call time is 12:15am

This role is unpaid 

Many thanks, 

Alfie

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Energy Drink Spec! (OC/LA, Paid) 

Currently casting for (3) youthful, female leads for an energy drink spec for a growing production company. 

The shoot (non-union) will be in Los Angeles/Orange County, sometime in May, with a day rate of $50. Along with compensation, the actors will get some BTS & additional photos + videos for  their social media/reel/portfolio.  

ISO: 

(1) – Beach Runner: clean, natural, everyday, fit/athletic girl-next-door type of character, this position will require some light jogging/running 
(1) – Pilates/Yoga Practitioner: quiet confidence, natural vibe, fit/athletic, disciplined
(1) – Party Attendee: Free Spirited, extroverted, high energy, bright smile,bold-ish vibe, but still maintaining the clean, athletic/fit look, etc. 

* Each role will have different skills/requirements

If interested, please submit your: 
- Contact information
- Dates you’re available in May
- Headshot, full body shot, reel
- Resume
to riannamamitag.prod@gmail.com ! 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Last Name - Role(s) - Spec 

Looking forward to your submissions & connecting with you! Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

items.text:
PUSSĒ — CASTING CALL

Project Type: Experimental Psychological Horror
Tone: Horror • Spiritual • Unsettling
Production: Katastrophic Films & IFM Entertainment
Location: Southwest Florida
Compensation: Unpaid (Passion Project / Portfolio Building)
Duration: 1-2 hours 
Date: end of April - early May

Send Submissions To - Kat.KatastrophicFilms@gmail.com

⸻

CHANNEL 2 — “BUDGET HEALTH PROGRAM”

Role: Older PBS Host
Gender: Male
Age Range: 50–75

Type:
Soft-spoken • Academic • Slightly awkward

Description:
We are seeking an actor to portray a monotone, early PBS-style presenter in a surreal broadcast segment. The performance should feel stiff and controlled, almost robotic in delivery.

The tone walks a fine line between subtle humor and quiet dread. The character should feel off in a way that’s difficult to immediately place. Should be disconnected, clinical, and unsettling beneath the surface.

Think: educational programming that slowly begins to feel wrong.

⸻

🎭 PERFORMANCE NOTES:

* Minimal, restrained delivery
* Comfort with long pauses and unnatural pacing
* Ability to create unease through stillness and tone rather than intensity
* Improvisation ability is a plus

⸻

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS:

Please include:

* Headshot
* Demo Reel
* Any relevant horror or stylized work

Also indicate your comfort level with:

* Horror elements
* SFX (blood, prosthetics)
* Nudity (for specific roles only)

⸻

⚠️ PROJECT NOTE:

This is a stylized, experimental piece with strong visual and tonal direction. Ideal for actors interested in psychological horror, analog aesthetics, and unconventional storytelling.

Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Ingen burde dø af kræft, endsige miste synet. Derfor vil jeg dele en opskrift på at fjerne alle kræftceller fra din krop og forhindre synstab.
For at blive ved med at modtage mine opskrifter, skal du bare sige noget ... Tak!

items.text:
De er så lækre, at jeg laver dem hver weekend! Enkel og velsmagende opskrift med kål!
Ingredienser:
Kål: 1 mellemstort hoved
Olivenolie: 50 ml
Salt: 1 tsk
Kværnet sort peber: efter smag
Rød peber: efter smag
"Jeg skal sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter...
Tak. Opskrift i første kommentar Se mindre

items.text:
Cześć! 👋

🎭 Jesteś aktorem lub przygotowujesz się do roli w języku angielskim?
Chcesz brzmieć naturalnie, pewnie i autentycznie na scenie lub przed kamerą? Świetnie trafiłeś!

Oferuję indywidualne korepetycje z języka angielskiego, specjalnie dopasowane do potrzeb aktorów, studentów szkół teatralnych oraz osób pracujących z tekstem – niezależnie od poziomu zaawansowania.

Jestem native speakerem z USA 🇺🇸 i od ponad 5 lat uczę angielskiego. Dodatkowo mam doświadczenie w pracy z aktorami – pomagam im:
🎬 przygotować się do ról anglojęzycznych
🎭 pracować nad wymową, akcentem i intonacją
🗣️ naturalnie interpretować dialogi i monologi
📖 analizować teksty sceniczne w języku angielskim
💬 przełamywać barierę językową w występach na żywo i castingu

Wspólnie skupimy się nie tylko na poprawności językowej, ale przede wszystkim na brzmieniu autentycznym i wiarygodnym dla widza.

Oprócz tego oferuję wsparcie w:
✔ przygotowaniu do egzaminów i matury
✔ języku biznesowym
✔ konwersacjach i ogólnej poprawie płynności

📍 Zajęcia prowadzę online oraz stacjonarnie
💰 Cena zależy od indywidualnych potrzeb (wiek, zakres materiału, forma zajęć)

Mówię płynnie po polsku, więc wszystko dokładnie wytłumaczę i dopasuję do Twojego stylu pracy.

📩 Napisz wiadomość prywatną, żeby ustalić szczegóły i zacząć pracę nad Twoim angielskim – tak, abyś mógł/mogła w pełni wejść w swoją rolę 🎭

CASTING – WARSZAWA (statystów)
Szukamy statystów na plan filmowy do zdjęć do serialu wertykalnego!

 Terminy zdjęć:

25.04 – statyści: goście klubu ze striptizem

28.04 – statyści: goście kasyna

Warszawa 

Projekt: serial (format wertykalny)

Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn, osób otwartych i naturalnych przed kamerą.

Zdjęcia trwają cały dzień (około 12 godzin)

Wynagrodzenie: 100 zł (gotówka po zdjęciach)

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej:

— aktualne zdjęcia

— wiek, wzrost

— dostępność na wybrane dni

Do zobaczenia na planie

🎥 Cześć! Do filmu autorstwa studentów Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej szukamy aktora do jednej z głównych ról w krótkometrażowym filmie fabularnym.

🔸 **Kogo szukamy?**
**Norbert **(25-35 lat) – charyzmatyczny łotrzyk, który prowadzi nie do końca legalny biznes. Szukamy osoby z doświadczeniem, najlepiej z dłuższymi włosami, ale nie jest to element konieczny, inne fryzury też wchodzą w grę:)

📍 Zdjęcia planowane są w drugiej połowie sierpnia tego roku

📩 Zgłoszenia (imię, nazwisko, telefon kontaktowy) z aktualnym zdjęciem (najlepiej luźne selfie) prosimy o przesyłanie na adres a.mikulska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

items.text:
🎭**------WORKSHOP "THE ART OF PRESENCE"-------**🎭                                                
                                   📅**25-29 May 2026**                     
              at📍 **La Guillotine** in **Montreuil (FRANCE)**📍

**Le Bateau Noir** is organizing a physical theatre workshop conceived and led by **Juraj Benko** and **Oriane Hours**. For actors and amateurs alike, this **5-day workshop** is structured in two parts: ***training ***and ***creation***. 

🌞Mornings will be dedicated to **training of an actor**. The focus will be on d**eveloping stage presence, precision in actions and intentions**. The ability to connect with others. Through various exercises drawn from dance, martial arts, and physical theatre, we will work together on different **body languages** ​​and **stage energies**, seeking to develop each participant's unique creativity, essential to the **actor's craft**. 

🌝In the **afternoons**, we apply the morning tools in a creative process — adding **voice **and **text **to build presence into dramaturgy. Each participant develops their own unique expressive **story**.

**Workshop is led in French and English language.** 

🌺 **Oriane Hours** : Trained in classical theatre & corporeal mime in Paris. Founder of Compagnie de l'Oiseau Jaune. Actress, physical theatre performer, dancer, director and actor pedagogue.

🌻 **Juraj Benko**: Slovak actor & theatre maker. Graduate of University of the Arts London. Trained at Nordisk Teaterlaboratorium - Odin Teatret. Pedagogue, physical theatre, director.

**Participation**: €230 + €10 (association membership)
💰**Total**: €240*

✨Participation includes lunches carefully prepared by the Bateau Noir team. Homemade vegetarian menus for everyone! ✨

🌱Register at **cie.lebateaunoir@gmail.com** with a short message about yourself!

🎯 Le Bateau Noir [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576666822835](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576666822835)

#physicaltheatre  #theatreworkshop #actortraining #Montreuil  #LeBateauNoir

attachments.ocrText: Na obrázku môže byť jedna osoba alebo viacerí ľudia a text, v ktorom sa píše „25 au 29 mai 2026 JURAJ BENKO ORIANE HOURS STAGE L'ART DE LA PRESENCE“
Môže ísť o ilustráciu text

Môže ísť o ilustráciu text, v ktorom sa píše „JURAJ BENKO Juraj Benko est acteur et créateur de spectacles originaire de Slovaquie. Diplômé de la prestigieuse Université d'Arts de Londres Jeu Scénique Spectacle vivant, poursuivi sa pratique travaillant des maîtres du théâtre européen asiatique notamment rejoignant Nordisk Teaterlaboratorium l'Odin Teatret. Sa formation d'acteur inclut les principes du théâtre physique, danse et des arts ORIANE HOURS Après des études théâtrales Paris, en théâtre classique mime corporel, Oriane Hours poursuit ensuite voie du théâtre physique en Europe. Passionnée du mouvement, elle monte Compagnie de l'Oiseau dans laquelle elle développe un univers engagé par création de spectacle une pédagogie de l'acteur.“

items.text:
## **CASTING CALL: BACKGROUND PERFORMERS (PAID* - Non union) 🎬**

We are looking for various background roles for an upcoming vertical production filming in **Richmond** **on April 21st, 2026.**

**❗️Please read the requirements carefully before applying.**
* **POLICE OFFICER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **REPORTER / VINTAGE CROWD:** Male, age: 18+
* **SHAREHOLDER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **BOXER:** Male, age: 20s. Must have an athletic/fit build.
* **REFEREE:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **CEO:** Male, age: 30s 
**HOW TO APPLY:**

Please send me a **Direct Message** on Facebook with the following:
1. The **role** you are applying for.
2. A **recent**, clear photo of yourself.
3. Confirmation that you are free for the **full day** on the 21st of April. (Must have **full-day availability**. While you likely won’t be needed for the entire day, we require a flexible schedule to accommodate production timing.) ***RATE:** $100 for a 5 hours

Thank you!

I sent you a message last night

Hi there! I am casting a few more roles for my upcoming short film Star Cats. 

This is an unpaid non-union project. Meals will provided along with IMDB credits :)

Shooting dates are May 29-31, but each of these roles will only need to be there one of the days.

Please email me at Daisyjanemars@gmail.com if you'd like some sides!

items.text: Hey Vancouver! Love on the Spectrum is coming to town this summer and we are looking for MEN ages 25-45 who are looking for love! You do not need to be on the spectrum to apply - if you know someone or are interested yourself please message me or apply now! [https://loveonthespectrumvancouver.castingcrane.com/](https://loveonthespectrumvancouver.castingcrane.com/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExdTUzSjhUaW1aOGQ1UUwwSHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4KWsPemZpBtYrbV4RbSCfQY-_7_frv2dFNubj_8AUMcB7e9ADFPTEegfoNog_aem_eqADyQZ1R8ygcaRjhLGYtA)

items.text:
Hey gang!!

So I've been working on a little project and I'd love to invite you all to come check it out!

This year I partnered with two incredible film makers, Seamus Birmingham and Jake Unger, to create a documentary about the school Pax attends The Rocky Mountain School of Expeditionary Learning - RMSEL. The fellas have done all the hard work, I just pointed at people and said, "ooo! they'd be good to talk to!" 

What they have created looks incredible and I could not be more proud!

We are having a big "red carpet" premiere/screening on May 28th at The People's Building. This will also be a fundraiser for both the school and the film to be submitted to festivals and what not. 

If you don't already know, this school is one of the most remarkable learning environments, but it is severly underfunded. It is not a charter or private school. It is a public school of choice governed by a BOCES board. As such, it does not recieve any bond or mill levy money that other schools (including charters) are allotted. This leaves us fighting for every dollar while providing a world class education and experiences of a lifetime to students. 

The film is titled, In The Absence of Shelter. Tickets will be available for purchase through The People's Building or at the door. $5 student and faculty $20 general public. [https://www.thepeoplesbuilding.com/about-us](https://www.thepeoplesbuilding.com/about-us)

The premiere is May 28th, 2026
Doors open at 6:00
Film is approximately 60 min run time
We will have a talk back afterwards with the film makers, students and faculty
The People's Building 
9995 E. Colfax
Aurora CO 80010

Hope to see youn there!! We would LOVE to get some press and local politicians in the room, so please share! Thanks!!!
